task.source_description: TCGA clinical TSV tables and somatic mutation MAF file(s).

braf_mutation.description: BRAF mutation strongly predicts lymph node metastasis.

age_ge_55_years.description: Age at diagnosis >= 55 years increases metastasis risk.

pathologic_t_t3_t4.description: Pathologic T3/T4 disease strongly predicts nodal spread.

extrathyroid_extension_present.description: Any recorded extrathyroid extension increases metastasis risk.

interface_notes.neural_truth_mapping: variance-derived heuristic initializer for NARS-style confidence
interface_notes.symbolic_rule_grounding: explicit NAL deduction from direct observation before revision
interface_notes.revision_assumption: neural and symbolic truths are treated as distinct evidential sources

comparison.baseline_vs_nars_gated_interpretation: The 95% bootstrap AUC confidence intervals overlap, so the observed difference should be treated as uncertain.
comparison.baseline_vs_nars_gated_brier_interpretat: The 95% paired bootstrap interval for the brier difference includes zero.
comparison.baseline_vs_nars_gated_ece_interpretatio: The 95% paired bootstrap interval for the ece difference includes zero.
